title: Wholesome Mexican Avocado Tostada
description: A resinous and fluffy avocado tostada that soothes hangovers with fresh chives and citrus.
instructions: Heat a dry skillet over medium heat and lightly oil the corn tortillas with a brush of olive oil.
Toast each tortilla for 2 minutes on each side until crisp and slightly browned.
Slice the avocado in half, remove the pit, and scoop the flesh into a bowl.
Add the diced cherry tomatoes, finely chopped red onion, minced garlic, and a pinch of salt to the avocado.
Mash the mixture lightly with a fork, then stir in the juice of one lime and chopped chives.
Spread the avocado mixture evenly onto each toasted tortilla, creating a resinous and fluffy topping.
Garnish with extra chives and a squeeze of lime for extra brightness.
Serve immediately on a wooden board for a rustic presentation.
